home.name: Kauã Cavalcante
home.description: Full Stack developer specialized in building scalable, secure, and modern solutions with a focus on robust APIs and end-to-end system development!
home.aboutParagraph1: I am passionate about technology and system development, focused on creating secure, scalable, and modern solutions. I study Systems Analysis and Development and keep evolving constantly.
home.aboutParagraph2: I have solid experience with Full Stack systems, RESTful APIs, relational databases, and implementing security best practices. I enjoy working with Django and Next.js, creating efficient and well-structured applications.

list.title: Vortex Project
list.description: Provides technology enthusiasts and students with the opportunity to share their ideas.

functionalities.title: Secure login via GitHub OAuth2
functionalities.description: Secure authentication using GitHub OAuth2, with session management and permission control.

functionalities.title: Share ideas with like-minded developers
functionalities.description: Publish and interact with projects and technical content within a development-focused community.

functionalities.title: Security first!
functionalities.description: Backend structured with data validation, token-based authentication, and user-level access control.

functionalities.title: Responsive across all devices
functionalities.description: Access Vortex from anywhere — whether on your desktop or mobile device.

list.developingDescription: Vortex is under active development, with a strong focus on security, stability, and scalability. As a social platform that handles authentication and user management, the codebase is proprietary, as expected for applications of this nature. Our priority is to build a solid and secure foundation before expanding access.
list.fullDescription: Vortex is a collaborative web platform designed for developers and technology students. The application was built using Django and Django REST Framework on the backend, and Next.js with TypeScript on the frontend, applying clean architecture principles, separation of concerns, and secure authentication via GitHub OAuth2. The project aims to demonstrate full stack competencies, including REST API modeling, permission control, server-side rendering (SSR), and best practices in organization and scalability.

list.title: Morpheus Env
list.description: Academic project focused on security practices and educational tools.

functionalities.title: Monitoring
functionalities.description: Real-time CPU, RAM, and Disk analysis with intuitive visualization.

functionalities.title: AI Analysis
functionalities.description: Generative AI to interpret system data and provide insights.

functionalities.title: Number Converter
functionalities.description: Complete support for binary, hexadecimal, octal, and decimal conversions.

functionalities.title: Logical Operations
functionalities.description: Execute AND, OR, and XOR operations to work with boolean values.

functionalities.title: Secure Authentication
functionalities.description: Robust system with temporary email validation and advanced protection.

functionalities.title: Notifications
functionalities.description: Email notifications with integrated Google OAuth2 authentication.

list.fullDescription: Morpheus Env is a web simulator that provides educational tools for analyzing computing systems. The project was developed for experimental and academic purposes, focused on research, learning, and concept demonstration.

list.title: Car Dealership
list.description: Automobile dealership management platform with internal administration and generative AI.

functionalities.title: Vehicle Management
functionalities.description: Create, update, and remove vehicles with full details.

functionalities.title: Internal Administration
functionalities.description: Admin panel to manage inventory, sales, and customers.

functionalities.title: AI Description Generation
functionalities.description: Generative AI to create detailed vehicle descriptions when information is incomplete.

functionalities.title: Responsive Interface
functionalities.description: Adaptive design for mobile and desktop devices.

functionalities.title: Sales Reports
functionalities.description: Tools for performance analysis and detailed report generation.

list.fullDescription: Software responsible for managing car dealerships. Compatible with generative AI integration to create descriptions when data is missing.

list.title: Parking Service
list.description: Complete RESTful parking management system with JWT authentication and real-time monitoring.

functionalities.title: JWT Authentication
functionalities.description: Secure registration and login using JSON Web Tokens to protect endpoints.

functionalities.title: Slot Management
functionalities.description: Full CRUD for parking slots, allowing add, update, delete, and list operations.

functionalities.title: Real-Time Monitoring
functionalities.description: Live tracking of parking slot occupancy.

functionalities.title: Interactive Documentation

list.fullDescription: Complete RESTful parking management system with JWT authentication, real-time monitoring, and interactive documentation.

list.title: Flix API
